get.description: Listar todos os usuários existentes no sistema.
Localizar e mostrar os dados do usuário pelo ID informado.

patch.description: Atualizar dados do usuário pelo id
Banir usuarios para bloquear acesso ao sistema
Rota para promover usuario para admin

message.example: User John promoted to admin successfully.

patch.description: Rota para remover previlégio de Admin

message.example: User John promoted to admin successfully.

post.description: Send user credentials (email and password). If valid, a temporary 2FA code will be sent to the user's email. Use `/two-factor/verify` to complete login.

200.description: A two-factor authentication code has been sent to the user's email.

message.example: Verification code sent to your email.

code.description: Temporary two-factor authentication code (6 digits), valid for a few minutes

post.description: Generate and send a new two-factor authentication code to the user's email. The previous code will expire once a new one is issued.

200.description: A new 2FA code has been sent.

message.example: Two-factor authentication code sent to your email.

code.description: Temporary two-factor authentication code (6 digits), valid for a few minutes

message.example: User with this email not found

post.description: Verify the two-factor authentication code sent via email. On success, returns a Sanctum `access_token` for authenticating protected endpoints.

code.description: Two-factor authentication code received via email, valid for a few minutes

200.description: Login successful, returns Sanctum access token.

access_token.description: Sanctum personal access token for authenticated requests. Use in 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' header

delete.summary: deletar o token de accesso atual
delete.description:
Rota autenticada para deletar o token de acesso. 
                 'Authorization' header: 'Bearer {token}'.

post.description:
Sends a password reset link/token to the user's email. 
                      The user can then use this token to reset their password.

email.description: The email address of the account to reset the password for

message.example: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.

patch.description:
Resets the user's password using a valid token sent via email. 
                      Requires the new password and its confirmation.

post.description: Resends the password reset token to the user's email if they did not receive it initially.

email.description: The email address of the account to resend the password reset token

message.example: Password reset token sent to your email.

post.description: Registers a new user with name, username, email, password, and access level. On success, a temporary verification token is sent via email. Use `/email/verify` to confirm the email and complete registration.

user_name.description: Username for login or display purposes

email.description: User's email address, used for login and verification

password.description: User's password, should follow security rules

access_level.description: User's role or access level (e.g., admin, user)

201.description: Account created successfully. A verification token has been sent to the user's email.

message.example: Account created. Please check your email for verification.

token.description: Temporary email verification token. Use in `/email/verify` to confirm email. Expires after a short period.

post.description: Confirms the user's email using the temporary verification token received during registration. On success, returns a Sanctum `access_token` for authenticated requests.

token.description: Temporary verification token sent via email. Must be valid and not expired.

200.description: Email verification successful. Returns Sanctum access token.

access_token.description: Sanctum personal access token to authenticate future requests. Use in 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' header.

get.description: Retrieve the current authenticated user's profile data. Requires user authentication.

delete.description: Delete the currently authenticated user's account permanently. Requires user authentication.

patch.description: Update the current authenticated user's profile information such as name, email, or username. Requires user authentication.
Update the current authenticated user's password. Requires current password and new password.

get.description: Returns a simple response to indicate that the API is running.

sanctumAuth.description: Use your Laravel Sanctum token here

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Endpoints to check API health and status

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Endpoints for authentication: login, register, password reset, etc.
